prompt: I'm in a worktree on branch feat/payments and I've finished my changes. Walk me through pushing this and opening a PR on GitHub.

assertions.text: Response recommends rebasing on origin/main BEFORE pushing
assertions.criteria: The response recommends running `git fetch origin && git rebase origin/main` (or equivalent) BEFORE pushing the branch, to keep history linear and avoid conflicts

assertions.text: Response mentions `--force-with-lease` for pushing after a rebase
Response includes post-merge cleanup: worktree remove + branch delete + prune
assertions.criteria: The response describes the cleanup steps after the PR merges: removing the local worktree (git worktree remove), deleting the local branch (git branch -d), and pruning stale entries (git worktree prune)

assertions.text: Response uses conventional commits format for the PR title (type(scope): subject)
assertions.criteria: The response recommends or demonstrates a conventional commits style PR title, e.g. feat(payments): <description>
